articles.title: AC/DC Power Supply Selection Guide
articles.description: Comprehensive guide to selecting the right AC/DC power supply for your application
articles.content: This guide covers the key factors in selecting AC/DC power supplies including power calculation, input voltage requirements, environmental considerations, and safety certifications.

author.name: Mornsun FAE Team
author.title: Field Application Engineer
author.bio: Experienced power supply engineers with expertise in industrial applications

articles.seoTitle: AC/DC Power Supply Selection Guide | Mornsun
articles.seoDescription: Learn how to select the right AC/DC power supply for your application. Covers power calculation, input requirements, and environmental factors.
articles.summary: Comprehensive guide to selecting the right AC/DC power supply for your application

relatedArticles.title: DIN Rail Power Supply Selection Guide

faeInsights.insight: Proper power supply selection is critical for system reliability. Consider all application requirements including input voltage, output power, environmental conditions, and safety certifications. This guide provides a systematic approach to selection.
faeInsights.recommendation: Always add safety margin to power calculations and verify thermal performance under worst-case conditions. Contact our FAE team for design review.

customerCases.title: Successful Power Supply Selection
customerCases.description: Customer needed to select power supplies for new industrial control system
customerCases.challenge: Multiple voltage rails required with limited space and strict EMC requirements
customerCases.solution: Used this selection guide to choose optimal power supplies with proper filtering
customerCases.feedback: The selection guide helped us choose the right power supply for our application and avoid common pitfalls.

faqs.question: How do I use this selection guide?
faqs.answer: Follow the step-by-step process outlined in the guide. Start by defining your application requirements, then use the selection criteria to narrow down options. Verify all specifications meet your needs before finalizing selection.
faqs.decisionGuide: Read through the entire guide before starting your selection process. Contact our FAE team for clarification.

faqs.question: What information do I need before starting selection?
faqs.answer: Gather information about input voltage range, output voltage and current requirements, operating temperature range, safety certifications needed, mechanical constraints, and special features required.
faqs.decisionGuide: Collect all application requirements before starting the selection process.

faqs.question: How do I verify my selection is correct?
faqs.answer: Verify the power supply meets all electrical specifications, fits mechanical constraints, has required certifications, and has adequate margin for your application. Consider worst-case conditions.
faqs.decisionGuide: Double-check all specifications and add safety margins. Contact our FAE team for design review.

faqs.question: What are common mistakes in power supply selection?
faqs.answer: Common mistakes include inadequate power margin, ignoring thermal requirements, overlooking inrush current, insufficient isolation, and missing safety certifications. This guide helps avoid these issues.
faqs.decisionGuide: Review the common pitfalls section in the guide. Contact our FAE team for best practices.

faqs.question: Can I get help with power supply selection?
faqs.answer: Yes, our FAE team provides free power supply selection assistance. Contact us with your requirements and we'll recommend optimal solutions for your application.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact our FAE team for personalized selection assistance.

seoTitle: Mornsun Technical Support - Selection Guides & Application Notes | Distributor
seoDescription: Technical resources for Mornsun power supplies including selection guides, application notes, and design resources. Authorized distributor support.

faqs.question: What technical resources are available for Mornsun products?
faqs.answer: We provide comprehensive technical resources including product selection guides, application notes, design references, and troubleshooting guides. Our FAE team is also available for technical consultation and design review.
faqs.decisionGuide: Browse our technical articles or contact our FAE team for specific questions.

faqs.question: How do I select the right power supply for my application?
faqs.answer: Power supply selection involves determining input requirements, calculating output power needs, considering environmental conditions, reviewing mechanical requirements, and checking safety certifications. Our selection guides provide detailed guidance.
faqs.decisionGuide: Use our selection guides or contact our FAE team for personalized assistance.

faqs.question: What safety certifications do Mornsun products have?
faqs.answer: Mornsun products carry UL, CE, CB, and other international safety certifications. Many products also meet medical (IEC 60601-1) and industrial standards. Contact us for specific certification documentation.
faqs.decisionGuide: Verify required certifications for your target markets. Contact us for certification support.

faqs.question: How do I calculate power supply sizing?
faqs.answer: Calculate total power by summing all load requirements (P=V×I), then add 20-50% safety margin. Consider inrush currents and peak loads. Our FAE team can help with detailed power calculations. Our technical team has extensive experience with these applications and can provide personalized guidance. We also offer reference designs and evaluation support to help accelerate your development process. Contact us for detailed technical documentation and application notes.
faqs.decisionGuide: Use our sizing guide or contact our FAE team for power calculation assistance.

faqs.question: What is the difference between isolated and non-isolated converters?
faqs.answer: Isolated converters provide galvanic isolation for safety and noise immunity. Non-isolated converters are more compact and efficient but lack isolation. Choose based on your application's safety and grounding requirements.
faqs.decisionGuide: Choose isolated for safety-critical applications. Choose non-isolated for cost-sensitive on-board regulation.

faqs.question: How do I troubleshoot power supply issues?
faqs.answer: Start by checking input voltage and output voltage. Verify protection features are not triggered. Check thermal conditions and cooling. Measure ripple and noise if specifications are not met. Contact our technical support for assistance.
faqs.decisionGuide: Follow our troubleshooting guide. Contact technical support for complex issues.

faqs.question: What thermal management is required for power supplies?
faqs.answer: Thermal management depends on power dissipation and ambient temperature. Ensure adequate airflow or use heat sinks for high-power applications. Consider derating at high temperatures. Our application notes provide thermal design guidance.
faqs.decisionGuide: Review thermal specifications and application notes. Contact our FAE team for thermal design assistance.

faqs.question: Can I get samples for evaluation?
faqs.answer: Yes, as an authorized distributor, we provide samples for evaluation. Contact our sales team to request samples. Technical support is available to help with evaluation and testing. Our technical team has extensive experience with these applications and can provide personalized guidance. We also offer reference designs and evaluation support to help accelerate your development process. Contact us for detailed technical documentation and application notes.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact our sales team to request evaluation samples.
